records.ety: [L. nullificare; nullus none + -ficare (in comp.) to make. See Null, a., and -fy.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Nullified (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Nullifying (?).]

defs: To make void; to render invalid; to deprive of legal force or efficacy.
quotes: Such correspondence would at once nullify the conditions of the probationary system.
